title: Huawei S210-24P2J Gbit Cloud PoE Switch
category: Huawei / LAN networks / Switches / eKit Switches
description: Huawei S210-24P2J is a reliable managed cloud L2 PoE switch with a switching capacity of 58Gbps , (24) Gbit PoE+ ports and (2) 2.5G SFP slots . The RJ45 ports support PoE+ with a 400W budget . It supports management via a local web interface as well as cloud management ( eKit SNC / eKit mobile app ). The maximum power consumption is 32.4W (without PoE load) (24) Gbit PoE+ ports and (2) 2.5G SFP slots PoE+ 802.3af/at with a total budget of 400W Perpetual PoE - ensures uninterrupted power supply to connected PoE devices even during switch restarts or upgrades Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) - automatic one-click updates Forwarding First - preferential traffic forwarding on ports 1-8 during uplink congestion Protection against DoS attacks and other security features Automatic loop prevention, VLAN, QoS and uplink port link aggregation Device Power cable Grounding cable Rack mounts Rubber feet
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (24) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (2) 1G/2.5Gbps Power Power type Mains power (230V) PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at PoE Out ports 24 PoE budget [W] 400 Max. power consumption [W] 483 Physical characteristics Design Rackmount "U" positions 1 Fans Yes Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset, mode Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 45 Weight [g] 2880 Width [mm] 442 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 220 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 58 MAC address table 8000 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 43.5
